$BTC #BTC | Understand a Market Maker

The market operates using the same algorithmic mechanics because it is highly effective as it is designed to analyse market sentiment through euphoria and despair. You feel bullish? You feel bearish? The algo is DESIGNED to make you directionally biased. You are trading based on what you see. A algorithm trades based on your emotion. You see a CHoCH? A market maker sees your stop loss. Not everything is as it seems and that is why when interpreting the chart, you need to have a deeper understanding in the markets mechanics & reasoning behind certain movements. 

Expectations vs reality are 2 different things. Rather than trying to "time a breakout", try to understand what phase we are in and utilise the typical market characteristics you see develop in these different phases. Operate based on TA not what you think will happen. With that said, BTC moves based on liquidity & sentiment, right now sentiment is hopeful and liquidity is stacking below us. With that said, I think we will range for a few more weeks before any decisive PA develops.

Market Phases & Dynamics | Education $BTC #BTC

The market moves in phases. A simple supply & Demand Dynamic. Understanding these Dynamics will allow you to position & react before typical retail. You would think that "the basic elements" of trading do not work effectively because of the level of simplicity but the reason why these phases work & are still so effective is because of the exploitation of human emotion through these movements. Each movement the market makes is designed to make human emotion spiral. That is why through fractals and looking at historical price action you will see similarities between certain movements purely because they are extremely effective methods used by MM & Institutional players. They simply Exploit human emotion through these phases and this is exactly how the bigger players will continue to profit indefinitely.   

The market spends 70% of its time in complex ranges. Understanding the trend & cycles will allow you to capitalise on every single market phase. Accumulation, Re-accumulation, Distribution, Re-distribution all inherit the same characteristics, Compression, Range, Deviations above Range highs & Range lows. These methods maximise the exploitation of human emotions, causing most market participants to react out of FOMO, ultimately leading them to liquidation.   

Your objective as a market participant is to understand these market movements & execute with 0 emotion. No directional bias. Trade the range until confirmation of breaking above/below. This algorithm has been playing out on every memecoin & altcoin. The key to staying ahead is identifying trend shifts and recognising changes in market phases.

Master the market by mastering your emotions—clarity in chaos is the edge that separates winners from the rest.

#BTC $BTC | I Predicted the Local top. Whats next?

Markets thrive on exploiting peak optimism & fear. A prime example of this dynamic is Elliott Waves, rooted in mathematical patterns tied to market psychology—fear, greed, and impulsive vs. corrective waves. In essence, for the 5% of traders to succeed, 95% must be wrong.

I initially took a swing short from 106K (Which was publicly posted) due to declining global liquidity and a macro environment favoring a strong dollar due to rising interest rates. After testing the 90K region, this established our Wave A, the first significant corrective wave.

As the new month and yearly open approached, we witnessed the typical early-month price manipulation—a rally designed to bait traders into a false narrative. This resulted in a sharp reversal, aligning perfectly with Wave B's characteristics: a retracement that reclaimed much of the initial drop. This psychological setup led many traders to turn bullish at 102K, with outcomes that were entirely predictable.

My new short entries within the 98-102K zone (averaging 100.5K) were based on Wave B testing the 0.618 Fib level - a textbook retracement point following Wave A. Market sentiment once again validated this, as optimism surged at precisely the wrong moment. Now, we're revisiting the 90K lows.

Their are ONLY Two Possible Scenarios

Scenario 1 (My Current outlook)
BTC continues bleeding through Q1 due to liquidity declines and dollar strength. This leads to a drop into the 75-85K region, forming a bottom in Q2 (March). From there, BTC could go parabolic, rallying into Q4 2025 (September).

Scenario 2 (Alternative)
BTC dips below 90K before reclaiming the range lows, triggering a rally through the rest of Q1 and forming a local top in March. This rally would likely be followed by a correction into the 80K imbalance and liquidity inefficiency zone."

A 50/50 Probability

My Viewpoint
As traders, Its imperative to consider all scenarios. However, I remain bearish and anticipate Scenario 1 unfolding. My invalidation point is simple: sustained price action above 100K.

Bitcoin Market Overview | $BTC #BTC

Bitcoin is approaching a key level at $70,600, just below the $72K daily/weekly high. A move toward this zone will be critical, as flipping $70,600 could lead to significant upside momentum, potentially taking us into price discovery and setting a new all-time high. If the market breaks through and sustains above $72K, shorts could be fully invalidated, and we may see a sharp upward move.

However, if $70,600-$72K is rejected, a lower time frame (LTF) distribution could unfold, leading to a correction. In this case, we may see a retracement toward the $66K demand zone, which would catch many traders off-guard. A pullback to $66K could provide an opportunity to reload long positions if buyers step in at this level. Its important to take into consideration that many breakout longers are left untargetted which increases the chances of a LTF corrective wave.

Although the overall bullish trend remains intact, it’s essential to stay cautious. Market makers (MMs) and algorithms often use these zones to trap traders, especially those chasing breakouts. Keep an eye on $66K as support, with the possibility of a deeper correction toward $60K if the breakdown continues. Stay alert for all outcomes and manage risk accordingly.

Bitcoin Market Structure Overview | $BTC #BTC

Eliminating directional bias will save you alot of money in range bound market. 

Bitcoin has had a significant mark upwards from the 59.3K lows. We have two different liquidity zones. One of those liquidation zones are at 63.7K-64K. If Bitcoin is unable to flip this area of resistance, It is likely that 63.7-64K forms a local top validating shorts. If we tap into the first liquidation zone & are unable to maintain bullish structure for the next leg, this likely results in testing lower levels. 

We have a small LTF area of support at 61.8K which if we hold above validates a push towards the liquidations above. However, if 61.8K lost = 61.2K (Breaker Block) is tested next. Lose the breaker block & the Daily EQLs are after.

Overall, We have liquidations around 64K. If we are unable to hold bullish structure, it would invalidate a sweep of $65K+ liquidations. A loss of $60K range lows would trigger a long liquidation cascade all the way down to 57.5K.

Bitcoin - Market Structure (Cheat Codes) | #BTC $BTC

The market operates like a living simulation, fueled by human behaviour,, algorithms, and data. News acts as a catalyst, disrupting this flow by transforming fear into frenzy or igniting euphoria. Significant economic events send shockwaves through the system, causing reactions to ripple across markets in both directions. It is your job to utilize this information in the best way possible.

A common pattern I have recognized is that each Local Top/Local Bottom is usually formed around FOMC or between fomc dates. Through the chart I have created, You can see a reference of this data showcased visually with Bitcoins price action. 

The next FOMC date is November the 6th but we are not focused on that date as of yet. We are focused on the "Middle of FOMC" illustrated on the chart. Typically the market develops a false narrative leading upto these dates. So if we are pumping/dumping upto these key psychological dates, we expect a inverse movement. 

The 12th of October is one of these key dates. If we are dumping/Pumping upto this date, we can expect it to mark a local top/bottom based on market structure. (Open high, Possible top, Open low, Possible bottom). Your objective is to analyse and pay attention to these dates as they act as key pivotable points. Referencing historical price action/Data can help analyse what scenario is more likely than the other.

Another common pattern I have recognized is since july, around the 5th-6th (Purple box) at the start of the month, it has recently been marking us a bottom. As said above, if we dump aggressively upto this date, we can speculate the possibility of marking a local bottom before continuation.

I hope you guys are able to recognize these patterns I have shared & utilize them. The market moves in waves with priced in news being the real market manipulator. 

P.S - If I go missing, I shared too much 😉
